causing havoc to the people, increase of robbers and severe asth-
matic complaints that shake the jaws. The second year will be a
source of troubles. The third will be highly advantageous and
auspicious. The year Raudra will be dreadful causing much
suffering and destruction. In the year Durmati the rainfall will
be moderate.

In the last lustrum owned by ^^^(Sun) the years are named
Dundubhi, UdgUrin (or Rudhirodgarin), Raktaksa, Krodha and
(K§aya). The first year is helpful to the growth of abundant
crops, the second year brings about the ruin of kings and has
uneven and irregular rains (or fierce at times). In the third year

96 Brhat SamhitU
there will be trouble from tusked animals like boars, and diseases.
The fourth year will engender excessive wrath (hatred) and will
denude kingdoms through hostilities.
